text: Welcome to the RenderMan Kaboom Box HDA

The HDA will greatly speedup up your pyro and volume workflow, allowing artists to quickly and easily lookdev and render explosions, fire, candles, and anything else in between.  The HDA offers both basic and advanced pyro lookdev controls plus a few presets to get you going quickly and easily.
At the heart of the HDA is a complex and robust PxrVolume shading network, developed especially for RenderMan by
, one of the many very talented VFX TD's at Pixar Animation Studios.
